memberdef.argsstring: (const DoubleTab &alpha, const DoubleTab &p, const DoubleTab &T, const DoubleTab &rho, const DoubleTab &mu, const DoubleTab &sigma, double Dh, const DoubleTab &ndv, const DoubleTab &d_bulles, DoubleTab &coeff) const override
memberdef.name: coefficient

memberdef.argsstring: (const DoubleTab &alpha, const DoubleTab &p, const DoubleTab &T, const DoubleTab &rho, const DoubleTab &mu, const DoubleTab &sigma, double Dh, const DoubleTab &ndv, const DoubleTab &d_bulles, DoubleTab &coeff) const override
memberdef.name: coefficient_CD

briefdescription.para: Vineet Kumar, Caleb S. Brooks, Inter-group mass transfer modeling in the two-group two-fluid model with interfacial area transport equation in condensing flow, International Journal of Heat and Mass Transfer, 2018, https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ijheatmasstransfer.2017.11.087.
Donne des informations sur le type de l'Objet_U.

simplesect.para: (const Type_info*) structure regroupant les informations sur le type de l'Objet_U

briefdescription.para: Ecriture de l'objet sur un flot de sortie Methode a surcharger.
Lecture d'un Objet_U sur un flot d'entree Methode a surcharger.
classe Frottement_interfacial_Kumar_Brooks coefficients de frottement interfacial d'un ecoulement a bulles
